jokes.setup: I bought my umbrella a calendar.
jokes.punchline: It likes to stay prepared for rainy days.

jokes.setup: My coffee spoon became a referee.
jokes.punchline: It always stirs things fairly.
Whenever I'm stuck, I open it.
It finally rose above the sheets.
It knows every bright idea takes time.
It's full of sole history.

jokes.setup: I bought my mirror a notebook.
jokes.punchline: It enjoys reflecting on the day.

jokes.setup: My broom opened a dance studio.
jokes.punchline: It specializes in sweeping moves.
They're always listening for clues.

jokes.setup: I gave my refrigerator a diary.
jokes.punchline: It has a lot bottled up.

jokes.setup: My doormat became a motivational speaker.
jokes.punchline: It never lets anyone walk over their dreams.
It always shows up in dark times.
It needed to unclip from work.
It promised equal measures for everyone.
It really sucked that praise right up.
Its delivery always boils over.
Laundry day became a guessing game.
Its stories are freshly written every morning.
It wanted to stay ahead of schedule.
It's the most grounded pet I've ever had.
It's climbing the rankings.

jokes.setup: I bought my backpack a vacation.
jokes.punchline: It finally unpacked.
It helps people express their feelings.
It's so hard to leave.

jokes.setup: My scissors became a movie critic.
jokes.punchline: They know exactly where to make the cut.

jokes.setup: I gave my wallet a pep talk.
jokes.punchline: Its confidence is priceless.

jokes.setup: My coffee filter became an artist.
jokes.punchline: It has a refined taste.
Now it sweeps with inner peace.
It keeps making bills appear.
It uses very small words.
It finished seated in comfort.
It keeps telling me to wait.
It's building character.
Its timing is always dry.
It wanted a better outlook.
It's incredibly flexible.
Everything it makes is light.

jokes.setup: I bought my pencil a helmet.
jokes.punchline: Better safe than pointy.
It's growing attached to the outdoors.
It remembers every tea time.
It said I gave it a clear perspective.

jokes.setup: My coat rack started a band.
jokes.punchline: It has plenty of hang time.

jokes.setup: I bought my slippers a map.
jokes.punchline: They've been going places lately.
Every shot is a self-portrait.
Every lesson ends with a whistle.
It always has another point.
It loves lending a hand.
It wanted to stay wrapped up in music.
Its performance was pretty cool.

jokes.setup: My bookmark became a travel guide.
jokes.punchline: It always knows where to stop.
